Wraps · Lunch
Spicy Tuna Wrap
Local tuna marinated in chili and lime, with cucumber, red onion, shredded lettuce and sriracha mayo
FJD$33
Price
1×
Portions
15 min
Prep
0 min
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Wrap
Flour tortilla 12"each1
Protein
Local tuna, dicedg120
Marinade
Lime juice, freshml20
Chili flakesg2.0
Filling
Cucumber, julienneg40
Red onion, fine slicedg20
Iceberg lettuce, shreddedg30
Sauce
Sriracha mayog30
Method
1
Dice tuna into 1.5 cm cubes. Marinate in lime, chili and salt for 10 min.
2
Lay tortilla flat. Spread sriracha mayo across centre.
3
Layer lettuce, cucumber, red onion.
4
Place marinated tuna over vegetables.
5
Fold sides in, roll tightly. Cut on 45° angle.
6
Plate with fries.
Plating Notes
Cut on diagonal. Tuna visible at cut face. Lime wedge garnish.
Equipment
Chopping board · Mixing bowl · Serrated knife
Allergens
GLUTEN EGGS FISH
DAIRY TREE NUTS PEANUTS SHELLFISH SOY SESAME CELERY MUSTARD LUPIN MOLLUSCS SULPHITES
